GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [c_last_name@0 ASC, c_first_name@1 ASC, substr(ms.s_city,Int64(1),Int64(30))@2 ASC, profit@5 ASC, ss_ticket_number@3 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[c_last_name@0 ASC, c_first_name@1 ASC, substr(ms.s_city,Int64(1),Int64(30))@2 ASC, profit@5 ASC, ss_ticket_number@3 ASC NULLS LAST], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[c_last_name@1 as c_last_name, c_first_name@0 as c_first_name, substr(s_city@3, 1, 30) as substr(ms.s_city,Int64(1),Int64(30)), ss_ticket_number@2 as ss_ticket_number, amt@4 as amt, profit@5 as profit]
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7895160
        GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(c_customer_sk@0, ss_customer_sk@1)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7]

                GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ss_ticket_number, ss_customer_sk, ss_addr_sk, s_city], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_coupon_amt), sum(store_sales.ss_net_profit)]
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7895160
